ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., conference, workshop) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company website of the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sponsor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship package */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsorship package */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day(s) of the event the package applies to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the package */,
  "slots" INTEGER /* Number of available slots for the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of the package (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Detailed list of benefits included in the package */,
  "max_sponsors" INTEGER /* Maximum number of sponsors allowed for the package */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_packages_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor who placed the order */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, paid, cancelled) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for reference */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day (e.g., Day 1, Day 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the day */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the day */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slot */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package the slot belongs to */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day the slot applies to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the slot (e.g., available, taken) */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of the slot (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slots_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slots_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_payments" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the relationship between the order and payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages_days" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the relationship between the package and day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "day_id")
)
